inputs.label: Number of Files
inputs.businessContext: Total count of files to store or transfer

businessContext_i18n.en: Total count of files to store or transfer
businessContext_i18n.tr: Depolanacak veya aktarılacak toplam dosya sayısı

inputs.label: Size per File
inputs.businessContext: Average size of each file in megabytes

businessContext_i18n.en: Average size of each file in megabytes
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir dosyanın megabayt cinsinden ortalama boyutu

inputs.label: Redundancy Factor
inputs.businessContext: Storage overhead factor for redundancy, e.g., RAID 5 = 1.2

businessContext_i18n.en: Storage overhead factor for redundancy, e.g., RAID 5 = 1.2
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yedeklilik için depolama ek yükü faktörü, örn. RAID 5 = 1,2

inputs.label: Compression Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Expected compression ratio between 0 and 1 (1 = no compression)

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected compression ratio between 0 and 1 (1 = no compression)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0 ile 1 arasında beklenen sıkıştırma oranı (1 = sıkıştırma yok)

inputs.label: Filesystem Overhead
inputs.businessContext: Filesystem metadata overhead per file in kilobytes

businessContext_i18n.en: Filesystem metadata overhead per file in kilobytes
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dosya başına kilobayt cinsinden dosya sistemi meta veri ek yükü

inputs.label: Network Transfer Speed
inputs.businessContext: Network speed in megabits per second for download/upload time estimation

businessContext_i18n.en: Network speed in megabits per second for download/upload time estimation
businessContext_i18n.tr: İndirme/yükleme süresi tahmini için megabit/saniye cinsinden ağ hızı

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
